name: N-5 node profile registration: include.detectors lists the five N-3 detector scripts per §2.5
command: for d in boundary-schema.sh console-in-src.sh fetch-timeout.sh naked-throw.sh supply-chain.sh; do grep -q "$d" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/node.yaml" || { echo missing 1>&2; exit 1; }; done && echo detectors_included 1>&2
